digest.greeting: Jean, today cleared the Incident Response send, the Janet BD transition scheduling, and the notebook next-step review. The work still open is mostly about keeping the PM operating structure, portfolio follow-ups, and late-day intake items from scattering across different places.

items.label: Sent the Incident Response information to Lucia Caamano
items.detail: The reminder to send Lucia the Incident Response context is checked off for today.

items.label: Scheduled the Janet BD transition conversation
items.detail: The Janet BD transition scheduling item is checked off, and tomorrow's calendar now includes a BD Portfolio Touchpoint & Transition meeting with Janet.

items.label: Reviewed the notebook next steps
items.detail: The reminder to review the notebook next-step notes is checked off.

items.label: Turn the PM team index, Planner, and weekly deck into one operating structure
items.detail: Keep shaping the Loop index, Planner updates, and weekly deck into one usable operating rhythm instead of three disconnected work surfaces.

items.label: Start LA AI change-management testing
items.detail: The LA AI testing item is still open. Give it a clean first pass before it gets buried under portfolio follow-ups.

items.label: Send Eugenia the PE project list and SOP template
items.detail: Send Eugenia the PE project list plus the agreed SOP template so the expected level of detail is clear before more portfolio reviews land.

items.label: Check the Mental Health Expansion charter deliverable
items.detail: Confirm whether Maria's draft charter is ready for stakeholder review or needs an owner/date adjustment.

items.label: Capture the Amazon Connect decisions and blockers
items.detail: The meeting agenda centered on open items, blockers, prior-week actions, and decisions needed. Capture what changed and what still needs a decision.

items.label: Close the BCP/Incident Response follow-up path
items.detail: Use today's BCP/IR touchpoint and Lucia follow-up to decide what needs to be handled async, especially with Tessa declined.

items.label: Find a new Marketing portfolio-review slot for next week
items.detail: Today's Marketing portfolio review was canceled because Paige could not attend and Lucia was overbooked. The next step is a cleaner next-week time with Paige, Lucia, and Amy.

items.label: Track the Legal Change Management requirement change
items.detail: Keep the new CLO approval path and status approach visible before the next implementation discussion.

items.label: Verify the Salesforce password-reset emails
items.detail: If Jean initiated the reset, finish it within the 24-hour window; if not, treat it as an account-security follow-up.

items.label: Review the new Phase 2 intake alert
items.detail: Janet sent a new Phase 2 intake alert late today. Review the request and decide whether it needs routing, ownership, or a portfolio follow-up.

items.label: Marketing Initial Project Portfolio Review was canceled
items.detail: Lucia said Paige could not make it and she was triple-booked, so Jean canceled the meeting and moved the next step to finding a better slot next week.

items.label: I-90 EC Overview was canceled
items.detail: Jessica Richburg sent a cancellation notice for I-90 EC Overview today.

items.label: EPMO EOW Check In
items.detail: Sara's EOW block includes live project tracking, support for blockers, a priority audit, and weekly programmatic updates.

items.label: Project pipeline (EPMO/IT weekly sync)
items.detail: Agenda includes new intake prioritization, BA assignment, changes in active projects, UAT status, and other workflow items.

items.label: Executive Project Status Slide Update
items.detail: Review and update the weekly Executive Projects deck with Jhara, Mar, Nicolas, Thiago, and Laura.

items.label: IT Litify Sprint #13 Review
items.detail: Sprint review with IT, PMs, and stakeholders for user stories in the deployment plan.

items.label: BD Portfolio Touchpoint & Transition
items.detail: New meeting with Janet to support the BD transition follow-up.
